arts.ttl: Real break 1bn euro barrier to top money league
arts.sum: Real Madrid become the first football club to generate more than 1bn euros in annual revenue, according to analysis by Deloitte.

arts.ttl: Tottenham stars are woken up at 2am by FIREWORKS outside team hotel - leaving Ange Postecoglou's men without a good night's rest ahead of Hoffenheim clash
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: Mail Sport understands a series of loud explosions, which went on for around five minutes, awoke many of the players at the complex around 30 minutes outside the village.

arts.ttl: Archie Gray names the four Tottenham stars who have helped him and the important advice he got
arts.sum: We're in a difficult position, but like you said it presents opportunities for players and I'm definitely grateful for being in the team and I'll keep doing my best wherever I'm played. I enjoy it and I think the best type of football us played when you've got to do lot of running and there's a lot of demands, so I enjoy it a lot.
